user_prompt: X3 mobile game festival decoration-pack SHOWCASE diorama, 2D semi-painted illustration, vibrant, bright. Compose EXACTLY like reference image 1 (the summer decoration showcase): a vertical 9:16 framed 'showcase room' — an ARCH made of coral/driftwood/seashells frames the scene at top, warm fairy-light string, a lush coral-and-tropical-plant foreground at the bottom, a cobbled sandy floor in the middle. HERO (large, center, prominent, occupying the upper-middle ~half of the frame): the EXACT beach lounge set from reference image 2 — a blue-and-white striped DECK CHAIR + matching striped PARASOL + small wooden side table. Display this furniture set faithfully and BIG as the sold product, do NOT shrink it into a wide landscape. BRIGHT sunlit shallow-sea diving ambiance: ocean blue/cyan/teal + warm sun + pearl white; light caustics, bubbles, drifting god-rays. ABSOLUTELY NO people, NO characters. NO UI buttons, NO text, NO numbers, NO watermark.
